rulings.Case Title: HAROLD GERECKE et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 12, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant John Crane Inc.'s demurrer to 2nd amended complaint is continued on Court's own motion to August 17, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/HEK)
